svg_blindspot:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
        style="background:#0a0e17;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #1f2937;width:100%;height:auto;max-width:900px">
<text x="450" y="20" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e5e7eb" font-size="11" font-weight="700">巡天盲区示意图 — (a, e) 空间</text><line x1="60" y1="150" x2="840" y2="150" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="60" y1="40" x2="60" y2="260" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1"/><text x="450" y="285" text-anchor="middle" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9">半长轴 a (AU) →</text><text x="30" y="150" text-anchor="middle" fill="#94a3b8" font-size="9" transform="rotate(-90, 30, 150)">偏心率 e →</text><circle cx="185.71428571428572" cy="246.43" r="5" fill="#3b82f6"/><text x="193.71428571428572" y="250.43" fill="#3b82f6" font-size="8">Earth</text><line x1="295.65714285714284" y1="40" x2="295.65714285714284" y2="260" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,3" opacity="0.4"/><text x="295.65714285714284" y="270" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ef4444" font-size="7" opacity="0.6">Mars</text><text x="830" y="270" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f59e0b" font-size="7" opacity="0.6">Jupiter→</text><rect x="80.0" y="40" width="105.71428571428572" height="210" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.08" rx="4"/><text x="132.85714285714286" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ef4444" font-size="8" font-weight="600">🔴 Aten盲区</text><text x="132.85714285714286" y="68" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ef4444" font-size="7">~33% missing</text><rect x="580" y="40" width="250" height="210" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.06" rx="4"/><text x="705" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f59e0b" font-size="8" font-weight="600">🟡 高倾角区</text><text x="705" y="68" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f59e0b" font-size="7">i>20° ~34% missing</text><rect x="502.85714285714283" y="40" width="317.14285714285717" height="210" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.06" rx="4"/><text x="661.4285714285714" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8b5cf6" font-size="8" font-weight="600">🟣 外侧区</text><text x="661.4285714285714" y="68" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8b5cf6" font-size="7">a>2.5AU ~15% missing</text><rect x="185.71428571428572" y="40" width="317.1428571428571" height="210" fill="#10b981" opacity="0.04" rx="4"/><text x="344.2857142857143" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="#10b981" font-size="8" font-weight="600">✅ 良好覆盖</text><path d="M 750 250 Q 700 200 650 240" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/><text x="730" y="245" fill="#f59e0b" font-size="7">主带源</text>
<defs>
  <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="5" refY="3" orient="auto">
    <path d="M0,0 L6,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#f59e0b"/>
  </marker>
</defs>
</svg>
